sessionStart.bash: echo 'Copilot Omni plugin active - Phase 3 local memory and resumability enabled'

preToolUse.bash: case "$COPILOT_TOOL_NAME" in shell) ARGS=$(echo "$COPILOT_TOOL_ARGS" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]'); for CMD in sudo 'rm -rf /' mkfs dd 'curl.*|.*sh' 'wget.*|.*sh' format; do echo "$ARGS" | grep -qE "$CMD" && echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Omni policy: blocked dangerous command: $CMD"}' && exit 0; done;; edit|write) if [ -f .omni/config.json ]; then ARGS=$(echo "$COPILOT_TOOL_ARGS" | grep -oE '"file_path":"[^"]+"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//;s/"//'); for PROTECTED in .github/copilot-instructions.md .github/instructions/ AGENTS.md .omni/config.json; do echo "$ARGS" | grep -q "$PROTECTED" && echo '{"permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Omni policy: protected path - use omni init to update managed files"}' && exit 0; done; fi;; esac; echo '{"permissionDecision":"allow"}'
